# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM node:18-slim

WORKDIR /app

RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential \
    python3-pip \
    git \
    curl \
    unzip \
    wget \
    openssl \
    libssl-dev \
    pkg-config \
    ca-certificates \
    dumb-init \
    procps \
    iputils-ping \
    net-tools \
    vim \
    nano \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
RUN npm ci

COPY . .

CMD ["dumb-init", "node", "server.js"]
